title: Amtech C2000 250mm (10") Adjustable Wrench with 30mm (1") jaw Opening
features: DURABLE: This adjustable wrench is made from heat treated, drop-forged carbon steel with chrome plating
SIZE CAPACITY: 200mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Wrench See more
